title: Accessing files should not introduce TOCTOU vulnerabilities
description: Race conditions can happen when file operations and their associated pre-checks are disconnected. Indeed, while the application assumes that the checked file property will not change before performing the operation, there is a chance that changes are applied to the file. Especially, a concurrent process, which an attacker can control, could modify a file right after a check is performed and before the actual use.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Potential TOCTOU vulnerability detected. File check operation followed by file access creates race condition opportunity.
